trends.id: ai chip startup cerebras files for ipo
trends.title: AI chip startup Cerebras files for IPO
trends.summary: In recent months, the company announced an agreement with Amazon Web Services to use Cerebras chips in Amazon data centers, as well as a deal with OpenAI reportedly worth more

trends.id: anthropics relationship with the trump administration seems to be thawing
trends.title: Anthropic’s relationship with the Trump administration seems to be thawing
trends.summary: Despite recently being designated a supply-chain risk by the Pentagon, Anthropic is still talking to high-level members of the Trump administration.

trends.id: the app store is booming again and ai may be why
trends.title: The App Store is booming again, and AI may be why
trends.summary: New data from Appfigures shows a swell of new app launches in 2026, suggesting AI tools could be fueling a mobile software boom.

trends.id: ai adoption outpaced the pc internet dive into the stanford report data via sejournal mattgsouthern
trends.title: AI Adoption Outpaced The PC & Internet: Dive Into The Stanford Report Data via @sejournal, @MattGSouthern
trends.summary: Stanford's 2026 AI Index covers 400+ pages of data.

trends.id: tesla brings its robotaxi service to dallas and houston
trends.title: Tesla brings its robotaxi service to Dallas and Houston
trends.summary: The company now offers robotaxi service in three cities, all of them in Texas, after launching in Austin last year and starting to offer rides without safety drivers in January

trends.id: vc ron conway says he has a rare form of cancer
trends.title: VC Ron Conway says he has a ‘rare form of cancer’
trends.summary: Conway wrote that he “will be stepping back from some of my usual activities,” but he will “continue to support” founders backed by his firm SV Angel.
